subcodes.first_line: O God, O God, I glorify Thee, O my Lord, my hope, my beloved and the object of my life. Verily thou knowest my humility
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
